blended.narrative: Montana Snowbowl is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 68".
